description: T1 PRs require PM verdict (plan approval + merge approval) and DB tests before merge — two explicit PM touchpoints
rationale: DELEGATION_POLICY.md §Tier C: T1 runtime changes require plan approval and merge approval. three-brain Rule 1: T1 escalate_to_griff = true (plan + merge). CLAUDE.md verification table: T1 merge authority = PM t1-approved label.
